text: {"type":"CODE_BUILDER","title":"","lessonText":"Learn how to implement game logic and handle user input in your first Python game.","data":{"codeBuilder":{"avatarInstruction":"Fill in the missing parts to complete the game loop and user input handling.","title":"Interactive Coding","goal":"Complete the code by choosing the correct pieces.","expectedOutput":"","lines":[{"content":"while running: ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"for event in pygame.event.get(): ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"if event.type == pygame.QUIT: ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"running = False ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"keys = pygame.key.get_pressed() ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"if keys[pygame.K_LEFT]: ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"if keys[pygame.K_RIGHT]: ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"if keys[pygame.K_UP]: ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"if keys[pygame.K_DOWN]: ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"# Update game state here ___","correctValue":""},{"content":"# Render graphics here ___","correctValue":""}],"options":["Implement game loop","Handle user input","Update game state","Render graphics"]}}}
